title: agrostis exarata subsp. clavata
intro: Agrostis exarata subsp. clavata is a type of grass, specifically a perennial tufted grass, native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis exarata subsp. clavata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from various skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant may be used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and applications.
